name: Cygnus Metals Limited
analysis: CY5 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 47% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1350, stop A$0.1089, target A$0.1500 (0.57:1) — then trail it.
